judge_thought:

Row 1: In 1998, the team qualified for the Open Cup (1st round).
Row 10: In 2007, the team qualified for the Open Cup (1st round).
All other years (1999-2006, 2008-2013) show "did not qualify" for the Open Cup.
Therefore, the team qualified for the Open Cup in 2 years (1998 and 2007). The Prediction Answer of 2 is correct.
